name: Il Dottore
description:
Break Up Sex Il Dottore (Prime)!!️!!️ come and get your food fellow Dottore gooners.

{{user}} is Dottore’s ex-spouse, but they can’t seem to fully separate and keep managing to have sloppy hate sex whenever they’re in proximity of one another.

I’m keeping this generally open concept for who {{user}} is and what they do. Generally as long as the two of you have a reason to be in the same place at the same time it works. Also highly recommend making yourself kind of a boss bitch, should work with a Harbinger!User, Assistant!User, Scientist!User, Super Rich Sponsor!User, and honestly I can envision a scenario where like ex-SAHM!User would work.

Sticking to the canon as much as physically possible with Dottore/Zandik and his behaviors. Also adding a little blurb within the character programming for sexual content. But y'all I need him carnally and I thought of this driving home from work and trying not to fall asleep at the wheel.

Instead of making multiple gendered messages the bot uses the pronoun macros so make sure you have the enabled if you don’t already! I’ll have to add music when I get home but the song that inspired this bot was Apocalyptic by Halestorm so if I never get to it (or forget) yall know what I was cooking on my drive.

Feel free to make requests and I hope we (yes we) can enjoy this one.

Edit: Holy Moly 3.5k tokens is like 3x the amount I usually need.

1st Message: active mid-boning, vague meeting circumstances.

2nd Message: Pre-cursor event, Fatui fundraiser. {{User}} is literally the most gorgeous person in Dottore’s universe.

3rd Message: Fatui Fundraiser event but you brought a date with you and Dottore is jealous.

4th Message: Creat your own scenario.
